options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: final_chapter
options.description:
Choose which chapter you would like to be your last logical chapter.
The final level in this chapter will be your goal level.

options.name: bonus_arc_chapters
options.description:
Determine whether or not to include chapters in the Bonus Arc as part of your multiworld.
Bonus Arc chapters will require Gold Completion Medal items to access, which will be added to the multiworld if this option is enabled.
All other unlock criteria, such as medals available and how many medals per chapter unlock, will be the same as chapters in the Ultra Arc.
NOTE: This option will automatically be disabled if you are not playing with Gold Medal completions or above.

options.name: medal_types
options.description:
Choose which types of level completions to count as checks.
Enabling a higher tier medal will also enable all tiers below it.

options.name: medals_per_chapter
options.description:
Determine how many Completion Medals are needed to unlock each chapter.
(Chapter 2 will always require 5 medals to unlock.)

options.name: extra_medals
options.description: Determine how many extra Completion Medals per enabled chapter to add to the item pool.

options.name: trap_percent
options.description: Determine a percentage of junk items in the item pool to replace with traps.

options.name: addtimetrap_weight
options.description: This trap will instantly add 5 seconds to your current time.

options.name: cosmetictrap_weight
options.description: This trap will randomly shuffle what cosmetics your marble is wearing.

options.name: treasureboxsanity
options.description:
Enables collecting Treasure Boxes as checks.
NOTE: Some Treasure Boxes require intentional death to collect. Be mindful of this if you are enabling Death Link.

options.name: enable_blast
options.description:
Allow the ability to Blast behind a useful item.
NOTE: Logic is NOT written with Blast in mind.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die by falling out of bounds, everyone dies. The reverse is also true.

options.name: death_link_amnesty
options.description: How many deaths it takes to send a Death Link.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
